function process_refund( $order_id, $amount = null, $reason = '' ) {
		$order = wc_get_order( $order_id );
		if ( ! $order ) {
			return false;
		}

		$transaction_id = $order->get_transaction_id();
		if ( ! $transaction_id ) {
			return false;
		}

		$refund = $this->create_refund( $order, $amount, $reason );

		if ( is_wp_error( $refund ) ) {
			return $refund;
		}

		$refund_id = $refund->get_id();
		$order->add_order_note(
			sprintf(
				/* translators: %1$s: refund ID, %2$s: transaction ID */
				__( 'Refund ID %1$s (via transaction %2$s) for %3$s', 'woocommerce-square' ),
				$refund_id,
				$transaction_id,
				$reason
			)
		);

		return true;
	}

function createQuotationByOrder($orderId)
    {
        $order = wc_get_order($orderId);
        $quotation = $this->createQuotation($order);

        if ($quotation->getSuccess()) {
            $this->updateOrderQuotation($order, $quotation);
        }

        return $quotation;
    }

function filter_styles( $styles ) {
		$filtered = array();

		foreach ( $styles as $style ) {
			if ( ! $this->is_style_allowed( $style ) ) {
				continue;
			}

			$filtered[] = $style;
		}

		return $filtered;
	}
